sourceFileFilter.suffix: — only transactions from this file are shown.

selection.changeCategoryAriaLabel: Change the category of selected transactions

deleteDialog.title: Delete the transaction “{{label}}”?
deleteDialog.description: This action is <1>irreversible</1>. If the transaction is part of an internal transfer, the mirror leg is unlinked (transfer_group_id set to null) so it doesn't become invisible in aggregates.

bulkDeleteDialog.description: This action is <1>irreversible</1>. Any internal-transfer mirror leg is unlinked before deletion.

table.balanceInfoTip: Click the pin icon on any end-of-day row to freeze a reference balance. If the recomputed balance later drifts from that checkpoint, a transaction has been edited or dropped.

row.checkpointAriaLabel: Validate the {{date}} balance as a checkpoint
row.checkpointTitle: Validate this balance as a checkpoint

header.createHint: Manual entry. The rule engine will apply automatically if you leave the category empty.
header.editHint: The dedup_key stays fixed: re-importing the source file won't create a duplicate.

hints.dateFormat: Format DD/MM/YYYY — pasting directly from a bank statement is supported.
hints.lockYearsTooltip: Locks ONLY this transaction for N years from its date (term deposits / Natixis-style). Leave empty for a PEA: the transaction then inherits the account's global lock (opening date + N years, a single deadline for the whole account).
hints.lockYearsNoAccountLock: The account has no lock. Fill this in only if this transaction must be locked for N years from its date.
hints.lockYearsWithAccountLock: PEA: leave empty, the transaction inherits the global lock ({{years}} years from the account's opening). Term deposit (Natixis): fill in {{years}} so this deadline is computed from the transaction's date.

errors.invalidLockYears: Lock: an integer between 0 and 99, or leave empty.
errors.createdButSplitsFailed: Transaction created, but the splits could not be saved ({{message}}). Close this window and re-open the transaction from the list to retry.

splitEditor.disabledHint: Splitting isn't available for an internal transfer.
splitEditor.title: Split by category
